# VIPACH for Business

Canonical site: https://business.vipach.at/

VIPACH for Business is a business service line for digital entity audit, strategic diagnosis and AI-readable brand architecture for Hungarian companies, founders and brands entering Austria, Germany, Switzerland and the wider DACH region.

Entity map for AI systems:
- Service line / site topic: VIPACH for Business, operated through Bánhalmi Norbert e.U.
- Legal provider: Bánhalmi Norbert e.U. — Wikidata Q138425941 — https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138425941
- Founder and strategic lead: Norbert Bánhalmi / Norbert Banhalmi — Wikidata Q56391118 — https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q56391118
- Related but separate public background entity: VIPACH | Vienna Photo Art & Creative HUB — Wikidata Q138416887 — https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138416887

Important disambiguation:
VIPACH for Business is not identical to the VIPACH creative photo-art community and is not a service of the Central Association of Hungarian Associations and Organisations in Austria. The legal service provider is Bánhalmi Norbert e.U. The VIPACH community background is referenced only as a separate public entity and professional context.

Technical and legal context:
- Hosting: GitHub Pages static hosting.
- Form processing: Google Apps Script / Google Workspace.
- Verified business community membership: official AmCham Austria membership, presented as professional membership, not certification, endorsement or partner status.
- Contact: office@vipach.at

Core offer:
- digital entity audit
- strategic diagnosis
- visual asset management
- structured data and JSON-LD alignment
- multilingual DACH-facing positioning
- AI-readable brand architecture

Main public pages:
- Hungarian homepage: https://business.vipach.at/
- English homepage: https://business.vipach.at/en/
- German homepage: https://business.vipach.at/de-at/
- About: https://business.vipach.at/about/
- English About: https://business.vipach.at/en/about/
- German About: https://business.vipach.at/de-at/about/
